steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The key signal is that the setting is nearly silent. Any quotation illustrating this must directly show or depict the quietness of the room.

steps.title: Match the evidence to the claim
steps.content: Choice D directly depicts the nearly silent setting: “everything in the room is quiet, so quiet that only the rustling of pages can be heard”. The other three choices focus on Valia's physical discomfort from cold, the book's size, or his actions at the window—none capture the silence of the setting. That matches choice D — D is correct.
